name: [GRIDHAND] Social Publishing Agent - Customer testimonial → format for each platform → publish

gridhand.scenario: Customer testimonial → format for each platform → publish
gridhand.description: When a customer leaves a 5-star review on the auto repair shop's website, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered, which then formats the testimonial into optimized posts for Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter, complete with relevant hashtags and eye-catching images. Over the next three days, these formatted testimonials are automatically published to each platform at peak engagement times, such as Tuesday afternoon on Facebook and Thursday morning on Instagram, to maximize visibility and attract new customers. By streamlining the process of sharing customer testimonials across social media, the shop owner can increase online reputation and drive more sales, without having to spend hours each week manually creating and scheduling posts.
